name: Trips
description: Hello Vietnam trips listing — filter header, staff pick banner, grid, regional map, custom journey CTA.

fields.heading: Small country, huge variety.
fields.body: From Ha Giang's northern passes to the Mekong's palm-lined channels — every region has its own flavor, texture, and pace.

fields.heading: Don't see it? Build it.
fields.body: Tell us your dates, your crew, and your cravings. We'll design a private itinerary from scratch — usually within 48 hours.
